title: Join The Team
description: Join the NSF Team We are seeking talented and motivated individuals to join the NSF…
text:
Join the NSF Team
We are seeking talented and motivated individuals to join the NSF Team as we propel the media organization forward during these exciting times. This form allows you to provide your details to our team leaders for consideration.
This page allows you to note what areas of NSF you’re interested in working in, such as Video Editing/Production/Graphics/Writing, etc.
Our main areas of interest are in writing, from articles to video script writers.
Please use this link to apply for writing positions:
When inquiring, please list experience and skill sets related to that role, with links to resume/samples.
For example, video editing, experience, ability to use Adobe Pro, etc. For writing, please provide links to previous work/samples.
Note: We pay for work conducted for NSF on writing and editing, so it is required that you are 18 or over if applying.
You can then provide your contact details so we can get back in touch with you.
